chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 123 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.17 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1198/2017 01.10.2025 Mr. Umer Akhund, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel pleads no instructions. This Special Sales Tax Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge ‘Amjad
